calls.notes: Called with uploaded_at prop value; returns locale-formatted date string (en-US, year/month/day/hour/minute). Returns 'Unknown date' if input is falsy; returns 'Invalid date' if input fails Date parse.
Fires onClick(document) when the card div is clicked. Guard: onClick is called only if the prop is defined (onClick && onClick(document)).

unusedImports.notes: Imported at DocumentCard.jsx:5 but never referenced in the component body. Dead import caused by the anti-pattern of exporting utilities from a god component.
